mapper.insert: insert into article (article_title, article_sign,author_id, author_name, article_content, create_time, change_time,favorites,likes) VALUES (#{articleTitle},#{articleSign},#{authorId},#{authorName},#{articleContent},#{createTime},#{changeTime},#{favorites},#{likes})
insert into article_like (article_id, author_id, create_time, change_time) VALUES ( #{articleId},#{authorId}, #{createTime}, #{changeTime})
insert into article_favorite (article_id, author_id, create_time, change_time) VALUES ( #{articleId},#{authorId}, #{createTime}, #{changeTime})
mapper.select: select * from article where author_id = #{authorId} order by create_time desc limit #{start} , #{end}
select count(id) from article where author_id=#{authorId}
select * from article where article_sign=#{sign} order by ${orderC} desc limit #{start} , #{num}
select count(id) from article where article_sign=#{sign}
select * from article join (select article_id from article_favorite where author_id = #{authorId}) as b where id=b.article_id limit #{start}, #{num}
select count(id) from article_favorite where author_id = #{authorId}
select * from article join (select article_id from article_like where author_id = #{authorId}) as b where id=b.article_id limit #{start}, #{num}
select count(id) from article_like where author_id = #{authorId}
select * from article order by create_time limit #{start} , #{num};
select * from article order by ${orderC} desc limit #{start}, #{num}
mapper.delete: delete from article where id = #{id} and author_id = #{authorId}
